zh.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson是Finn Håreksson和NN Aslaksdatter的兒子，出生。他和Brigida Ulfsdatter至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson是Finn Håreksson和NN Aslaksdatter的儿子，出生。他和Brigida Ulfsdatter至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Finnson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Declan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fionnáin ‘descendant of Fionnán’, from a diminutive of fionn ‘fair’.

nameMeanings.name: Håkån
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

variants.name: Hagen
meanings: 1 Germanic: short form of various compound names formed with hag ‘stockade, enclosure’.

variants.name: Hakon
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

variants.name: Håkan
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

en.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson was born as the son of Finn Håreksson and NN Aslaksdatter. He had at least 1 daughter with Brigida Ulfsdatter.

fr.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson est né, fils de Finn Håreksson et NN Aslaksdatter. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Brigida Ulfsdatter.

de.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson wurde, als Sohn von Finn Håreksson und NN Aslaksdatter geboren. Er hatte mit Brigida Ulfsdatter mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson è nato il come figlio di Finn Håreksson e NN Aslaksdatter. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Brigida Ulfsdatter.

ja.lifeSummary: Håkån FinnsonはFinn HårekssonとNN Aslaksdatterの息子として生まれた。彼はBrigida Ulfsdatterとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson(은)는 Finn Håreksson(와)과 NN Aslaksdatter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Brigida Ulfsdatter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson nasceu filho de Finn Håreksson e NN Aslaksdatter. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Brigida Ulfsdatter.

ru.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson родился. Его родителей звали Finn Håreksson и NN Aslaksdatter. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Brigida Ulfsdatter.

es.lifeSummary: Håkån Finnson nació como hijo de Finn Håreksson y NN Aslaksdatter. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Brigida Ulfsdatter.
